member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.CsrService
member.summary: Service for parsing and validating Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs). Uses KAZ-SIGN for signature verification via ICryptoProvider.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.CsrService.GetAlgorithmFromOid(System.String)
member.summary: Maps algorithm OID to KeyAlgorithm enum.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.CsrService.GetAlgorithmFromPublicKeySize(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines the KAZ-SIGN algorithm based on public key size.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.Asn1Reader
member.summary: Simple ASN.1/DER reader for parsing CSRs.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService
member.summary: Service for managing recovery tokens using Shamir's secret sharing.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService.__LogDeactivatedTokensStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RecoveryTokenService.__LogRevokedTokensStruct
member.summary: This API supports the logging infrastructure and is not intended to be used directly from your code. It is subject to change in the future.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Identity.Infrastructure.Services.RegistrationCertificateService
member.summary: Implementation of IRegistrationCertificateService that integrates with the Certificate module for certificate issuance.
